title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Acuite Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
